base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending_cutscene — a ui (menu_screen) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Ending cutscene — Mario/Luigi/Toad/Peach defeat Wart + dream-reveal (the 'it was all a dream' ending) + credits. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ending cutscene — Mario/Luigi/Toad/Peach defeat Wart + dream-reveal (the 'it was all a dream' ending) + credits
